mainEntity.name: What exactly is answer engine optimization for website voice search, and how is it different from regular SEO?

acceptedAnswer.text:
Answer engine optimization (AEO) for voice search means structuring your site so assistants like Siri, Google Assistant, and Alexa choose your content as the spoken answer.

It focuses on direct, conversational answers, structured data, and technical performance so your pages become the “one best answer” for question-style queries.

**Key factors**
- Lead each page or section with a 30–60 word direct answer in natural language.
- Use FAQ, HowTo, LocalBusiness, and Speakable schema to mark up answers.
- Target long-tail, question-based keywords (“how,” “what,” “near me”).
- Ensure mobile speed, HTTPS, and clean site structure.

Start by listing your customers’ real questions, rewriting key pages around Q&A, and adding appropriate schema markup and fast mobile performance.

Think of AEO as upgrading your existing SEO so your site is chosen, not just seen, when people ask their devices questions.
acceptedAnswer.description: Answer engine optimization (AEO) for voice search is the practice of structuring content so voice assistants pick your pages as the spoken answer. It goes beyond traditional SEO by emphasizing question-based content, concise direct answers, and schema markup that makes your information easy for AI and voice systems to extract and read aloud.
